creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: After upgrading to www/libxul 24.3.0, external content handling with Conkeror no longer works.  For example, if one clicks a pdf link, the external application fails to load.  When the link is clicked, nothing happens and there are no logs I can see with any information.  If I run Conkeror with Firefox's libxul everything works again.
